title: Google Cloud Private Link Costs for Atlas Stream Processing

sections.heading: Stream Processors
sections.body:
Atlas charges per hour per stream processor, where the hourly rate
is determined by the tier of the stream processor. Atlas Stream Processing bills
users for stream processors only when they are running. Billing is
recorded in one-second increments.

> **Important:** `SP10` and `SP30` processors operate and bill users
> according to the legacy worker model. These processors
> update to the per-processor pricing model on December 3rd,
> 2025\. To learn more, see the [worker model](atlas-sp-architecture-workers-legacy) section of the
> Atlas Stream Processing architecture overview.

The allocated vCPU and RAM vary depending on your stream processor
tier:

| Stream Processor Tier | vCPU | RAM    | Bandwidth | Max Parallelism | Kafka Partition Limit |
| --------------------- | ---- | ------ | --------- | --------------- | --------------------- |
| SP2                   | 0.25 | 512 MB | 50 Mbps   | 1               | 32                    |
| SP5                   | 0.5  | 1 GB   | 125 Mbps  | 2               | 64                    |
| SP10                  | 1    | 2 GB   | 200 Mbps  | 8               | Unlimited             |
| SP30                  | 2    | 8 GB   | 750 Mbps  | 16              | Unlimited             |
| SP50                  | 8    | 32 GB  | 2500 Mbps | 64              | Unlimited             |

> **Note:** Atlas doesn't charge for storage.

sections.heading: Stream Processors
sections.body:
The cost of running a stream processor at a given tier varies by
region. The following table shows the hourly price for a stream
processor of a given tier in a given region.

| Region     | SP2     | SP5     | SP10    | SP30    | SP50    |
| ---------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- |
| eastus     | $0.0550 | $0.1100 | $0.1900 | $0.3900 | $1.5600 |
| eastus2    | $0.0550 | $0.1100 | $0.1900 | $0.3900 | $1.5600 |
| westeurope | $0.0631 | $0.1261 | $0.2653 | $0.5445 | $2.1780 |
| westus     | $0.0689 | $0.1379 | $0.2510 | $0.5152 | $2.0606 |

sections.heading: Stream Processors
sections.body:
The cost of running a stream processor at a given tier varies by
region. The following table shows the hourly price for a stream
processor of a given tier in a given region.

| Region       | SP2     | SP5     | SP10    | SP30    | SP50    |
| ------------ | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- | ------- |
| europe-west1 | $0.0605 | $0.1210 | $0.2090 | $0.4290 | $1.7161 |
| us-central1  | $0.0550 | $0.1100 | $0.1900 | $0.3900 | $1.5600 |

sections.heading: Data Transfer
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for all egress data transfer based on the transfer
type and destination. Data transfer pricing varies by cloud provider
and follows a tiered structure from lowest to highest cost. Data
transfer charges per GB.

> **See Also:** 
>
> - Atlas pricing page
>
> - [Atlas Stream Processing](atlas-sp-overview)

sections.heading: Data Transfer
sections.body:
The price per GB for data transfer depends on the relationship between
the source region and the target.

| Data Transfer Type | Price per GB    |
| ------------------ | --------------- |
| Same Region        | $0.01           |
| Different Region   | $0.02 to $0.138 |
| Out to Internet    | $0.09 - $0.155  |

sections.heading: Data Transfer
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing data transfer costs depend on the relationship between
the origin region and the destination.

| Data Transfer Type  | Price per GB     |
| ------------------- | ---------------- |
| Same Region         | No charge        |
| Same Continent      | $0.02 to $0.16   |
| Different Continent | $0.05 to $0.16   |
| Out to Internet     | $0.087 to $0.181 |

sections.heading: Data Transfer
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing data transfer costs are based on the
relationship between the origin region and the destination.

| Data Transfer Type                 | Price per GB |
| ---------------------------------- | ------------ |
| Same Region                        | $0.01        |
| Different Region: North America    | $0.02        |
| Different Region: Oceania & Africa | $0.157       |
| Different Region: Other            | $0.08        |
| Out to Internet: Americas & Europe | $0.12        |
| Out to Internet: China             | $0.23        |
| Out to Internet: Australia         | $0.19        |

sections.heading: VPC Peering
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for all [VPC/VNet peering](vpc-peering) connections. To learn more, see
[Networking](atlas-sp-security-networking).

IMPORTANT: Atlas Stream Processing supports VPC peering connections
only for AWS (Amazon Web Services) and Google Cloud workspaces.

sections.heading: VPC Peering
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for VPC peering connections at either an hourly
or monthly rate. These rates vary by region.

| Region          | Hourly Price per Connection | Monthly Price per Connection |
| --------------- | --------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| asia-southeast1 | $0.0617                     | $45.03                       |
| europe-west1    | $0.0551                     | $40.19                       |
| europe-west2    | $0.0570                     | $41.61                       |
| europe-west3    | $0.0590                     | $43.07                       |
| europe-west4    | $0.0525                     | $38.32                       |
| us-central1     | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-east1        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-east4        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-east7        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |
| us-west1        | $0.0500                     | $36.50                       |

sections.heading: Private Link
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for all [Learn About Private Endpoints in Atlas](private-endpoint-overview) connections. To learn more, see
[Add a Kafka Private Link Connection](atlas-sp-pl-kafka-add).

sections.heading: Private Link
sections.body:
Atlas Stream Processing charges for Private Link connections at either an hourly
or monthly rate. These rates vary by region.

| AWS Region                       | Hourly Price per Connection | Monthly Price per Connection |
| -------------------------------- | --------------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| us-east-1 Virginia, USA          | $0.070                      | $51.10                       |
| us-east-2 Ohio, USA              | $0.070                      | $51.10                       |
| us-west-2 Oregon, USA            | $0.070                      | $51.10                       |
| sa-east-1 Sao Paulo, Brazil      | $0.112                      | $81.67                       |
| eu-west-1 Ireland                | $0.088                      | $63.96                       |
| eu-west-2 London, England        | $0.090                      | $65.98                       |
| eu-central-1 Frankfurt, Germany  | $0.093                      | $67.74                       |
| ap-south-1 Mumbai, India         | $0.074                      | $53.99                       |
| ap-southeast-1 Singapore         | $0.087                      | $63.49                       |
| ap-southeast-2 Sydney, Australia | $0.098                      | $71.20                       |
| ca-central-1 Canada              | $0.077                      | $54.82                       |
